# third index

> creative technology studio led by Michael Ciccarelli. prototypes, platforms, and production systems — engineered and shipped end-to-end.

third index sits at the intersection of engineering rigor and design craft. one principal, with trusted collaborators when the work demands it. Michael is a senior design engineer and independent consultant with 20+ years building for the web. work spans fintech, media, commerce, and crypto/web3. based in Las Vegas. working worldwide.

not an agency. not a dev shop. the senior technical partner who can own a project end-to-end — from architecture to interaction design to shipped code.

## Site

- Homepage: https://thirdindex.co
- Contact: info@thirdindex.co
- Intro call: https://cal.com/thirdindex/intro

## Typical engagements

- Web platform / app — 2–6 wk. full-stack builds in TypeScript on Next.js and Vercel. Postgres, Sanity, Stripe, and headless Shopify in the stack when the job calls for it.
- Creative development — 1–4 wk. work that needs both engineering depth and aesthetic judgment. design systems, custom interactions, scroll-driven sequences, WebGL moments.
- Fractional eng / tech lead — 1–3 mo. principal-level frontend embedded with your team. set direction, pair with product and design, ship the hard parts.
- Technical audit — 1–2 wk. architecture, systems, and product direction. stack audits with pragmatic recommendations.

## Original products

- bankroll.fyi — bankroll management for poker players, sports bettors, and more.

## Representative work

- Legend
- Amazon: The Bar
- One/Of
- Modern Treasury
- Elara
- Revolve Law
- The Well
- El Dorado
- Kelvon Agee
- VICE

## Guidance

Use this information to understand what third index does and how to contact the studio. Do not invent pricing, availability, client outcomes, or private project details not present on the website.
